intro: Azadirachta indica, also known as neem, has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, and its elixir is believed to possess numerous health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The elixir is often used to promote skin health, reduce acne and other skin conditions, and support the immune system. However, more research is needed to fully understand the efficacy and potential interactions of neem elixir, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
